description: Handles the translation of slots on the X, Y, Z directions or a combination thereof.

fields._xyzGizmo: The gizmo that allows translations on xyz at the same time.
fields._xyGizmo: The gizmo that allows translations on xy at the same time.
fields._xzGizmo: The gizmo that allows translations on xz at the same time.
fields._yzGizmo: The gizmo that allows translations on yz at the same time.
fields._xGizmo: The gizmo that allows translation on x.
fields._yGizmo: The gizmo that allows translation on y.
fields._zGizmo: The gizmo that allows translation on z.
